texto: Sweezy argued on the basis of Marx and Keynes that “accumulation is the primary factor” in capitalist development, yet noted that its influence was waning. “There is no mechanism in the system,” he explained, “for adjusting investment opportunities to the way capitalists want to accumulate and no reason to suppose that if investment opportunities are inadequate capitalists will turn to consumption—quite the contrary.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John Bellamy Foster sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Sweezy argued on the basis of Marx and Keynes that “accumulation is the primary factor” in capita…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, capitalism, consumption, útil em momentos de consumption.
